name: Pisa VR Travel - Climb the leaning tower

reviews.review_title: Lean back & enjoy iconic Leaning Tower
reviews.review_description:
Lean back in your vr chair and enjoy the iconic Leaning Tower.

Embedded in a beautiful landscape of Tuscany, Italy, Pisa and its landmark, the continously tilting tower are destinations you have to visit. Shame on me, I haven't been to Pisa, whereas my children did visit and enjoy the Tuscany and Pisa. Now with this VR app, part of a bundle I bought, I was able to make up for it. I enjoyed the VR tour from the beginning to the end, especially the walkaroud the tower by looking up the tower and having it in focus the entire time. Great experience which I definitely could not do when really walking myself around it.

Cool experience is also seeing all the people around, especially the ones posing weardly for a photo ;))
